description.value:
Frequency once every 10 minutes

Trigger A creature hits you with a jaws Strike or other bite attack

Effect You spurt a buildup of mucous down the attacking creature's throat, forcing it to attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|options:inflicts:sickened] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).
